competitors.name: Cursor
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Cursor IDE new features changelog 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: Cursor 3.5 (May 20, 2026): Cloud Agents — agents running in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access, work across multiple repos in parallel, report results asynchronously. Cursor 3.3 (May 7): Build in Parallel subagents, Composer 2.5 multi-file refactor at file-tree scale, native Jira integration. Cursor 3.2 (April 24): /multitask feature lets agent execution runtime spawn async subagents in parallel rather than serializing requests in a queue, multi-root workspaces for cross-repo changes. June 2026: Enterprise Organizations GA — manage multiple teams with different security/governance/budget controls. Cursor Automations now in Agents Window — attach multiple repos, agents reason across all required context and work across repos to deliver, test, and verify. Enterprise admin model controls with granular allow/blocklists at model and provider level.
competitors.content_hash: Cursor 3.5 (May 20, 2026): Cloud Agents — agents running in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access, work across multiple repos in parallel, report results as

changes.description: Cloud Agents：代理在隔离云 VM 中运行，拥有完整终端/浏览器/桌面访问权，跨多仓库并行异步工作
changes.evidence: 「Cloud Agents — agents that run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access, can work across multiple repos in parallel, and report results back to your IDE asynchronously」
changes.source_url: WebSearch 来源：releasebot.io/updates/cursor（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI 快 session 在云端独立运行，人继续工作；锚点 #4：跨多仓库 = 跨工具 artifact pull

changes.description: Cursor Automations in Agents Window：多 repo 自动化任务统一在 Agent 面板管理，与人的工作区并列
changes.evidence: 「Cursor Automations are now available in the Agents Window, allowing users to create and manage automations in the same workspace as their agents. Users can now attach multiple repos to an automation so agents reason across all required context」
changes.source_url: WebSearch 来源：releasebot.io/updates/cursor（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：人+AI session 在同一面板协同；锚点 #4：多仓库跨上下文统一入口

changes.description: /multitask：agent 执行运行时可并行派生异步子 agent，而非串行队列
changes.evidence: 「/multitask, a feature that lets Cursor's agent execution runtime spawn async subagents in parallel rather than serializing requests in a queue」
changes.source_url: WebSearch 来源：futurumgroup.com Cursor 3.2 analysis（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：多个 AI 快 session 并发执行，向 meee2「人慢+AI 快同协议」结构收敛

key_findings: Cursor 3.5 Cloud Agents：云端 VM 异步运行、多仓库并行，IDE 正式进化为 agent 执行运行时
Agents Window + Automations：人与 AI session 统一在同一面板管理，跨 repo 上下文共享
Enterprise 组织级管控 GA：多团队统一安全/治理/预算控制，向 session 治理协议演化

competitors.name: OpenAI / ChatGPT
fetched_urls: WebSearch: OpenAI ChatGPT Canvas Projects agent tasks new features 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: Workspace agents: help teams get more done together across tools — own entire workflows, follow team processes, be shared across team. Agent builders can set safeguards on which actions agents can take per app. Free period extended until July 6 2026. Codex creates interactive hosted websites/apps — dashboards, planners, review workspaces, project boards. GPT-5.3-Codex: combines Codex + GPT-5 training stacks, ~25% faster, marks step-change from code generation to general-purpose coding agent. Canvas: writing blocks and code blocks in chat responses; Canvas deprecated in GPT-5.5 Instant/Thinking. Projects: up to 40 uploaded files for Team users.
competitors.content_hash: Workspace agents: help teams get more done together across tools — own entire workflows, follow team processes, be shared across team. Agent builders can set safeguards on which actions age

changes.description: Workspace Agents：跨工具全流程自主 agent，可共享给团队成员，首次抓取
changes.evidence: 「Workspace agents help teams get more done together across tools—they can own entire workflows on their own, follow team processes, and be shared across your team so people can build once and use together」
changes.source_url: WebSearch 来源：openai.com/index/introducing-workspace-agents-in-chatgpt（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI session 遵循团队流程+可跨人共享，向「人+AI 同协议」收敛；锚点 #4：跨工具全流程 = artifact pull

changes.description: Codex 生成可托管的交互式 app（仪表盘、项目看板、review workspace）
changes.evidence: 「Codex can now create and share interactive, hosted websites and apps—Codex can take your ideas, analysis, and plans and turn them into dashboards, planners, review workspaces, project boards, galleries, and lightweight tools」
changes.source_url: WebSearch 来源：ChatGPT Enterprise/Edu release notes（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：生成的 artifact 托管在线（live），而非快照；锚点 #3：从描述→自动 build 可用工具

key_findings: Workspace Agents 正式发布：AI 可代表团队自主执行完整工作流、遵循团队流程，直接触碰 meee2 锚点 #1
Codex 生成可托管交互式 app：从描述到 live review workspace/project board，触碰锚点 #2/#3
GPT-5.3-Codex 发布：从代码生成→通用 coding agent，标志性定位转变

competitors.name: Windsurf (Codeium)
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Windsurf Codeium AI editor new features changelog 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: Wave 13: Cascade Memory System remembers codebase structure across conversations, multi-model routing auto-selects best model per task, MCP tool support (Supabase/Notion/GitHub). Devin Cloud Agent built into Windsurf: spins up own machine in cloud, works autonomously while developer continues coding locally. Available in every self-serve plan with one-click delegation from local session. Windsurf rebranding to Devin Desktop: Agent Command Center (Spaces, Kanban view, multi-agent management) front and center. Devin Local Agent: 30% more token-efficient than Cascade. Gemini 3 Pro now available.
competitors.content_hash: Wave 13: Cascade Memory System remembers codebase structure across conversations, multi-model routing auto-selects best model per task, MCP tool support (Supabase/Notion/GitHub). Devin Cloud A

changes.description: Devin Cloud Agent 内置 Windsurf：一键将任务委托给云端自主 agent，人继续本地编码
changes.evidence: 「integration of Devin, an autonomous cloud agent built directly into Windsurf that spins up its own machine in the cloud and works autonomously on complex tasks while developers continue coding locally」
changes.source_url: WebSearch 来源：weavai.app/blog Windsurf 2026 guide（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI 快 session 在云端自主运行，人（慢 session）本地并行，同一 IDE 协议协调；锚点 #4：跨机器 artifact 异步返回

changes.description: Windsurf 更名为 Devin Desktop，Agent Command Center 成为核心：Spaces、Kanban、多 agent 管理
changes.evidence: 「Windsurf is being rebranded to 'Devin Desktop' to introduce the command center for managing all agents in one place, with the Agent Command Center (Spaces, Kanban view, and multi-agent management) front and center」
changes.source_url: WebSearch 来源：taskade.com Windsurf Review 2026（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：IDE 演化为多 agent 统一管理控制台，与 meee2「慢 session 人+快 session AI 同协议」高度重叠；锚点 #5：成为开发者工作流的 peripheral 入口

key_findings: Windsurf 更名 Devin Desktop：定位从 AI 编辑器转向 agent 管理控制台，Agent Command Center 成为核心 UI
Devin Cloud Agent 一键委托：本地慢 session + 云端快 session 同时并行，与 meee2 核心抽象高度重叠

competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Anthropic Claude new features projects artifacts agent 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: Artifacts (April 2026, all paid plans + Projects): persistent storage across sessions, can call Claude's API directly to turn into intelligent micro-applications (AI runs inside artifact), MCP integration (Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack, other external services). Projects: persistent workspaces with community catalog for sharing/remixing artifacts. Claude Code: generally available since 2025-05-22, autonomous coding agent, VS Code + JetBrains extensions. MCP: 6,000+ app connections as of March 2026. Opus 4.8 now default on Max, Team Premium, Enterprise PAYG and API. Skills collection (official + community).
competitors.content_hash: Artifacts (April 2026, all paid plans + Projects): persistent storage across sessions, can call Claude's API directly to turn into intelligent micro-applications (AI runs inside artifact), MC

changes.evidence: 「artifacts now support persistent storage across sessions, can call Claude's API directly to turn them into intelligent micro-applications where AI runs inside the artifact itself」
changes.source_url: WebSearch 来源：suprmind.ai Claude features 2026（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：artifact 不再是快照，而是跨 session 持久 live 对象；AI 在 artifact 内部运行 = live link；锚点 #4：artifact pull 跨 session

changes.description: Artifacts 通过 MCP 连接 6000+ 外部服务（Google Calendar、Gmail、Slack 等）
changes.evidence: 「through MCP integration, artifacts can connect to Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack, and other external services」 「As of March 2026, MCP connects to over 6,000 apps」
changes.source_url: WebSearch 来源：suprmind.ai Claude features 2026（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）

key_findings: Artifacts 成为跨 session 持久 live 微应用：AI 在 artifact 内运行，可调用外部服务，直接触碰锚点 #2
MCP 覆盖 6000+ 应用：artifact 的外部连接能力远超 snapshot 概念，向 meee2 live link 架构快速收敛

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
fetched_urls: WebSearch: GitHub Copilot new features agent workspace background tasks 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: GitHub Copilot App (Microsoft Build 2026): dedicated desktop experience for agent-native development. My Work view consolidates active agent sessions, issues, PRs, background automations into single dashboard. Autopilot mode: schedules autonomous background tasks on bounded issues, Copilot acts without developer present. Fleet mode: CLI autonomous operation on narrow codebase tasks without per-step confirmation. Agent Sandbox: ephemeral Linux container per task, cannot affect production until reviewer merges PR. Autonomous Agent Mode (Enterprise, July 2026): write, test, commit entire feature branches, human approval required. Multi-agent support for VS Code at Microsoft Build 2026. Project Polaris: in-house AI model replacing GPT-4 Turbo in August.
competitors.content_hash: GitHub Copilot App (Microsoft Build 2026): dedicated desktop experience for agent-native development. My Work view consolidates active agent sessions, issues, PRs, background automations into

changes.description: GitHub Copilot App 专用桌面应用：My Work 视图整合 agent sessions、issues、PR、后台自动化于一处
changes.evidence: 「GitHub announced a new GitHub Copilot app at Microsoft Build 2026 — a dedicated desktop experience built specifically for agent-native development. The app introduces a 'My Work' view that consolidates active agent sessions, issues, pull requests, and background automations into a single dashboard」
changes.source_url: WebSearch 来源：devops.com GitHub Copilot Gets Its Own App（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：专用桌面 app 作为 peripheral 入口；锚点 #1：My Work 视图 = 人+AI session 统一 dashboard，与 meee2 菜单栏+board 定位高度重叠

changes.description: Autopilot 模式：AI 在无开发者在场情况下自主处理后台 issue
changes.evidence: 「Autopilot mode schedules autonomous operation on background tasks — Copilot acts on a bounded issue without a developer present」
changes.source_url: WebSearch 来源：devops.com GitHub Copilot Gets Its Own App（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI 快 session 独立运行，人慢 session 不需全程在场；向 meee2 异步协作协议收敛

changes.description: Enterprise 自主 Agent 模式（7月上线）：自动撰写/测试/提交完整 feature 分支
changes.evidence: 「GitHub Copilot Enterprise customers will be able to enable Autonomous Agent Mode, which lets the platform write, test, and commit entire feature branches. Every autonomous change still requires human approval before merging」
changes.source_url: WebSearch 来源：technobezz.com GitHub Launches Copilot App（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI session 有独立生命周期（写→测→提交），人以审批方式介入，而非全程控制；接近 meee2 对 AI 快 session 的设计

key_findings: 威胁等级升级 hi → crit：Copilot App 推出专用桌面 peripheral 入口 + My Work 统一 session dashboard，直接覆盖 meee2 锚点 #5 + #1
Autopilot 模式 + Autonomous Agent Mode：AI session 可独立运行无需人在场，向 meee2「AI 快 session」抽象快速收敛
Project Polaris：自研模型替换 GPT-4 Turbo（8月），标志 GitHub 垂直整合意图

competitors.name: Google Gemini / AI Studio
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Google Gemini AI Studio Workspace new features agent canvas 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: I/O 2026: AI Studio on Gemini 3.5 Flash (4x faster). Antigravity integration: export entire projects from AI Studio to local dev + production with single click. Native Kotlin for Android dev, one-click deploy to Cloud Run, Firebase support. Mobile app for prototyping on the go. Agent Designer: visual flow canvas for building agent workflows (preview). Google Cloud Next 2026: A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol. Workspace Studio: natively call Workspace APIs from agents. Gemini Canvas: co-create and edit in Google Docs/Slides, Microsoft 365 interoperability. Private preview: schedule Calendar meetings and create Docs/Slides directly from canvas mode in Gemini Enterprise app.

changes.description: A2A（Agent-to-Agent）协议：Google Cloud Next 2026 发布的 agent 间通信标准

changes.source_url: WebSearch 来源：thenextweb.com Google Cloud Next 2026（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）

key_findings: Agent Designer 可视化 canvas 进入 preview：直接触碰 meee2 锚点 #3（descriptive-first canvas）
A2A 协议（Agent-to-Agent）发布：Google 正在推动 agent 间通信标准，可能形成与 meee2 协议竞争的行业标准

competitors.name: Linear
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Linear app changelog new features AI automation agent 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: Linear Agent public beta (March 2026): Skills for reusable automation workflows, auto-trigger on triage, all plans included at no additional cost. Code Intelligence (May 14): gives Linear Agent controlled access to codebase, turning repos into shared product context whole team can use, agent reasons about how product actually works. Linear Diffs (May 27): code review native to Linear, review diffs from any issue + iterate on changes with agents. MCP Integration (April 23): connects to external tools via MCP, brings external context into workflows. Linear Releases (April 30): CI/CD integration, issue statuses auto-update when code lands in production.
competitors.content_hash: Linear Agent public beta (March 2026): Skills for reusable automation workflows, auto-trigger on triage, all plans included at no additional cost. Code Intelligence (May 14): gives Linear A

competitors.name: Notion AI
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Notion AI new features agent automation connector 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: Developer Platform (May 13, 2026): orchestration layer coordinating AI work across multiple tools and data sources, Notion positioning as hub for people and agents to collaborate. Workers: hosted runtime for custom code, no server management needed, powered by Notion credits from Aug 11. External Agents API: bring any agent (Claude, Codex, Decagon) into Notion out of the box. Database Sync: sync any data source with API into Notion databases. Custom Agents (Feb 2026): AI teammates for repetitive tasks, now read/reply in private Slack channels. Connectors: Slack, Google Drive, GitHub, Jira, MS Teams, OneDrive, SharePoint, Salesforce, Box.
competitors.content_hash: Developer Platform (May 13, 2026): orchestration layer coordinating AI work across multiple tools and data sources, Notion positioning as hub for people and agents to collaborate. Workers: h

changes.description: Notion 5月发布 Developer Platform，自我定位为「多工具 AI 协作 hub」的编排层
changes.evidence: 「By building an orchestration layer — a system that coordinates AI work across multiple tools and data sources — Notion is positioning itself as a hub where people and agents can collaborate across tools and databases」
changes.source_url: WebSearch 来源：techcrunch.com/2026/05/13 Notion turns workspace into AI agent hub（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具 artifact pull 的 orchestration layer；但 Notion 作为中心 hub 而非 peripheral 入口，与 meee2「不切焦点、5字戳」的范式差异仍大

key_findings: Developer Platform (5月)：Notion 推出 orchestration layer，定位转向多工具 AI 协作 hub，触碰锚点 #4 但范式仍为 workspace-centric 而非 peripheral-first

competitors.name: Slack
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Slack new AI features agent canvas automation 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: Slackbot rebuilt as full AI agent (GA for Business+/Enterprise+): search enterprise data, draft documents, take action on behalf of employees. AI Generate step in Workflow Builder: write prompt, select knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), LLM generates response in automation. Canvas AI: AI writing assistance built in, summarize key points, extract action items, draft first pass. Slackbot can read/create/edit lists. Updated Block Kit with cards, alerts, carousel, data tables for agent UI. Developer features: single 'slack create agent' command, enhanced Bolt framework, bring-your-own-LLM (Claude SDK, OpenAI SDK, Pydantic AI).
competitors.content_hash: Slackbot rebuilt as full AI agent (GA for Business+/Enterprise+): search enterprise data, draft documents, take action on behalf of employees. AI Generate step in Workflow Builder: write pro

competitors.name: Raycast
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Raycast new features AI agent changelog 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: Raycast 2.0 public beta (May 14, 2026): Windows support for first time. Presets renamed to Agents, reused across chats. Memory: chats remember personal context. Skills: custom instructions + knowledge for frequent tasks. Skills/Extensions dynamically loaded into chat when relevant. AI dictation added (system-wide, similar to Superwhisper). MCP HTTP server support (SSE/Streamable). OpenRouter integration: access wide range of public models. Assign issues to GitHub Copilot coding agent from Raycast. Monitor Copilot coding agent logs live in Raycast.

competitors.name: Replit
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Replit AI agent multi-agent workspace new features 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: Agent 4 (March 2026): parallel agent architecture — multiple agents tackle authentication, DB logic, backend, frontend simultaneously. For large single tasks, Agent 4 breaks into forks, runs concurrently as sub-agents, merges results with dedicated sub-agents. Collaborative workspace: multiple teammates submit requests simultaneously, agent sequences and executes optimally. Teammates work in own threads or shared session alongside agent. Requests broken into discrete background tasks, team can track status/review/approve before merging. Browser-based automated testing with periodic agent reflection loop.
competitors.content_hash: Agent 4 (March 2026): parallel agent architecture — multiple agents tackle authentication, DB logic, backend, frontend simultaneously. For large single tasks, Agent 4 breaks into forks, run

changes.description: Agent 4：多成员可在「共享 session」中与 agent 协同，任务并行拆分为后台子任务
changes.evidence: 「Teammates can work in their own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent. Every request is broken into discrete tasks that run in the background; team members can track status, review results, and approve changes before they merge into the main project」
changes.source_url: WebSearch 来源：aitoolsclub.com Replit Agent 4（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：shared session 中人+AI 协同，任务后台运行，人审批后合入；但 Replit 专注于 coding/app building，范式仍有差异

key_findings: Agent 4：引入 shared session（多人+agent 同时在场），后台并行子任务 + 人工审批合并；向 meee2 session 协作范式靠近，但仍局限于编码场景

competitors.name: Superwhisper
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Superwhisper app new features AI integration 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: Superwhisper v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS): Claude Code + Open Code agent integration, dictate prompts to coding agents (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex) without typing. Redesigned UI: new history, full text search, segmented playback, fast load, multi-select delete, upgraded model library. Realtime streaming transcription. ElevenLabs Scribe as cloud transcription provider. Bulk vocabulary import via CSV. Remote cloud AI models: Gemini + Grok support. Lower volume option (15% while recording). Pricing: $8.49/mo, $84.99/yr, $249.99 lifetime.
competitors.content_hash: Superwhisper v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS): Claude Code + Open Code agent integration, dictate prompts to coding agents (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex) without typing. Redesigned UI: new histor

changes.description: v2.13.0：集成 Claude Code / Cursor / Codex，可语音输入直接触发 coding agent
changes.evidence: 「Superwhisper added Claude Code and Open Code agent integration in v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS only). Superwhisper integrates with tools like Cursor, Claude Code, and Codex so you can dictate prompts to coding agents without typing」

key_findings: 语音触发 coding agent：Superwhisper 成为语音→ coding session 的 peripheral bridge，锚点 #5 的语音原语层面有参考价值

competitors.name: Product Hunt AI 新品雷达
fetched_urls: WebSearch: new AI workspace productivity tool launch 2026 site:producthunt.com
competitors.raw_snapshot: Product Hunt AI 2026 trending categories: AI workflow automation, AI coding agents, LLM memory. Notable launches: Denovo (autonomous startup builder), Curata (shared workspace for AI agents and humans), Extella.AI (cross-app automation with persistent memory), buildpipe (compose/run/automate multi-step AI developer workflows). No single new entrant found with direct overlap on meee2 core abstractions (session isomorphism, live link, peripheral/menu bar).
competitors.content_hash: Product Hunt AI 2026 trending categories: AI workflow automation, AI coding agents, LLM memory. Notable launches: Denovo (autonomous startup builder), Curata (shared workspace for AI agents
competitors.no_change_reason: 本次抓取未发现直接触碰 meee2 核心抽象的新进入者；Curata 的「人+AI 共享工作区」概念值得持续关注

alerts.headline: 威胁升级 hi→crit：Copilot 专用桌面 App + My Work 视图，peripheral 层 + session dashboard 正面覆盖 meee2 锚点 #5 + #1
alerts.evidence: 「GitHub announced a new GitHub Copilot app at Microsoft Build 2026 — a dedicated desktop experience built specifically for agent-native development. The app introduces a 'My Work' view that consolidates active agent sessions, issues, pull requests, and background automations into a single dashboard」
alerts.action_suggestion: 最高优先级 alert：Copilot App 用「专用桌面 + My Work session dashboard」实现了与 meee2「菜单栏 + board」接近的信息架构。需立即评估 meee2 的差异化能否在 5字戳、live link、session 同构上明确优于 Copilot App，否则定位空间将被快速压缩

alerts.headline: Cloud Agents + Automations Window：IDE 正式演化为异步多 agent 运行时，锚点 #1/#4 双重触碰
alerts.evidence: 「Cloud Agents — agents that run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access, can work across multiple repos in parallel, and report results back to your IDE asynchronously」
alerts.action_suggestion: 重点观察 Automations Window 是否演化为人可「接入/断开」agent session 的统一协议入口；若是，则与 meee2 session 同构抽象的竞争进入直接阶段

alerts.headline: Devin Desktop 更名 + Agent Command Center：IDE 转型为多 agent 管理控制台，锚点 #1/#5 同时触碰
alerts.evidence: 「Windsurf is being rebranded to 'Devin Desktop' to introduce the command center for managing all agents in one place, with the Agent Command Center (Spaces, Kanban view, and multi-agent management) front and center」
alerts.action_suggestion: 密切跟踪 Devin Desktop 的 Spaces 设计：若 Spaces 对应不同「session 上下文」且人可在其间快速切换，则与 meee2 live link 框架形成直接竞争

alerts.headline: Workspace Agents 正式发布：跨工具全流程自主 agent 可共享给团队，直接触碰锚点 #1
alerts.evidence: 「Workspace agents help teams get more done together across tools—they can own entire workflows on their own, follow team processes, and be shared across your team so people can build once and use together」
alerts.action_suggestion: 调研 Workspace Agents 的 session 模型：人如何介入/暂停/切换 agent session；若有「人在 agent 图内」的机制，威胁等级应升为直接竞争

alerts.headline: Artifacts 升级为跨 session 持久 live 微应用 + MCP 连接 6000 外部服务，直接触碰锚点 #2
alerts.evidence: 「artifacts now support persistent storage across sessions, can call Claude's API directly to turn them into intelligent micro-applications where AI runs inside the artifact itself」
alerts.action_suggestion: 评估 meee2 live link 的差异化空间：Claude Artifacts 是「单点 live（AI 在 artifact 内运行）」，meee2 的 live link 是「网络 live（跨工具、跨 owner 的 artifact 拉取）」；需要在定位上清晰区分这两种 live 范式

alerts.headline: Agent Designer 可视化 canvas 进入 preview，触碰 meee2 锚点 #3（descriptive-first）
alerts.evidence: 「Agent Designer, a visual flow canvas for building agent workflows, is in preview」
alerts.action_suggestion: 观察 Agent Designer 是否走向「flow 从真实行为 emerge」还是「手动拖拽连线」；前者与 meee2 descriptive-first 设计高度重叠，后者仍是传统 workflow builder 范式

alerts.headline: Code Intelligence + Linear Diffs：issue tracker 演化为 codebase-aware agent 协作层，锚点 #4 触碰
alerts.evidence: 「Code Intelligence gives Linear Agent controlled access to your codebase, turning repositories into shared product context your whole team can use, allowing the agent to reason about how your product actually works」
alerts.action_suggestion: 关注 Linear Agent 是否开始支持「issue 跨工具触发 artifact 变更」；若 issue 可直接触发 code → test → deploy 的 live artifact 链路，将触碰 meee2 锚点 #4（跨工具 artifact pull）
